---
title: "Go further"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{go-further}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(squirrels)
```

<!-- WARNING - This vignette is generated by {fusen} from dev/flat_get_welcome_message_raul.Rmd: do not edit by hand -->

# get_welcome_message_raul

```{r examples-get_welcome_message_raul}
get_welcome_message_raul()
get_welcome_message_raul(date="09/02/1982")

```
